block_01: NKE is riding a wave of success after receiving not one, but two rating upgrades.
block_03: Time to buy NKE stock at its new all-time high?
block_06: Nike shares rose 3% yesterday after Piper Jaffray upgraded NKE stock to Overweight from Neutral, boosting its price target to $93. Susquehanna also bumped NKE from to Neutral to Positive, citing the company’s growing market share.
block_07: Analysts are praising Nike’s ability to cope with inventory challenges and its approach to rebuilding revenue growth. Wall Street is feeling bullish, with Susquehanna saying Nike could meet its $50 billion revenue goal for 2023.
block_08: What’s in store for Nike? Now may be a good time to make a prediction.
block_10: *Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results.
